_comment: Evosep batch detection patterns for caspa/assign_batches.py. Patterns are tried in order; first match wins per sample.
_format: regex is applied case-insensitively to sample_id. group selects the capture group used as the batch key; its trailing digits determine sort order.

patterns.name: evosep_plate
patterns.description: PRIMARY — Evosep plate identifier 'S{N}-{well}' (e.g. S4-H1, s1-a1). S{N} = physical plate loaded on Evosep, well = position in 96-well plate. Batch = plate number.

patterns.name: plate_keyword
patterns.description: FALLBACK — Matches 'plate1', 'plate2' etc. when no Evosep S{N}-{well} pattern is present. Batch = plate number.
